title: microlicia neglecta
intro: Microlicia neglecta, also known as the "neglected microlicia," is a plant species that belongs to the family Melastomataceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and providing relief from respiratory issues. Microlicia neglecta can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
